name: python-native
description: Semantic Python project tools for Codex using pyright and pyright-langserver.

interface.shortDescription: Use pyright for semantic Python work
interface.longDescription: Adds token-efficient Python code intelligence for Codex by exposing pyright-langserver LSP hover, definitions, references, symbols, diagnostics, and code actions, plus pyright JSON diagnostics and Python compile checks.
defaultPrompt: Use pyright to inspect this Python code.
Run pyright diagnostics on this project.
Find Python definitions and references semantically.
